content.en:
"Territorial Sea Boundary Sea!" Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor was taken aback, but when he thought that it had not been too long for Ye Tiancai to break through to the Boundary Breaking Level, and the Heavenly Ancestors would not usually discuss the Territorial Sea Boundary Seam, so there were indeed very few Great Ancestors who knew that the Territorial Sea Boundary Seam was indeed very few.

So, the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor introduced, "You should know that there are many realms and immeasurable realms in the Infinite Realm Ruins, and the area where so many realms are located is called the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea. We are now in the territorial waters of Wanlong, and the only way to leave Wanlong's territorial waters is through the boundary gap of the territorial waters. However, I don't know what is in the cracks of the territorial waters, if you ask me. I only know that the boundary rift in the territorial waters is very dangerous, and after a Heavenly Ancestor like me enters, there is only one in 10,000 hope of surviving. Only a Heavenly Ancestor like Dongao Heavenly Ancestor would dare to enter the boundary crack of the territorial waters!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian finally knew why Wutong Heavenly Ancestor had fled to the Boundary Rift, once he fled there, at least there was still hope of survival.

But if you don't flee there, you will almost certainly die.

It's a pity that he was directly caught by Dongao Tianzu before he escaped into the crack of the territorial waters.

"In other words, besides Wanlong's territorial waters, are there other territorial waters?" Ye Tian asked.

"There should be!" Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor said, "However, it is too difficult to shuttle through the territorial sea boundary cracks, so we don't have much chance to contact other Heavenly Ancestors in territorial waters." It's still not good, if I'm very strong, I really want to enter the territorial waters, there are a lot of opportunities!"

"Chances, are there still many opportunities in the territorial sea seas?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"The True Dragon Realm Ruins are it!" the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor introduced, "The True Dragon Realm Ruins are actually a special fragment that floated in from the cracks in the territorial waters from an endless period ago. It is said that it was two incomparably powerful Heavenly Ancestors who fought in the territorial waters of Wanlong, causing a node to collapse, and it happened that a special fragment fell in, and finally turned into the ruins of the True Dragon Realm!

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

"Since the True Dragon Realm Ruins are a fragment, why did the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order appear again?"

He didn't understand a little, why did there be thirty-six True Dragon Realm Ruin Orders?

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor explained, "The True Dragon Realm Ruins Order is a special token made from the True Dragon Realm Ruins Origin Fragment, and it was not refined by the Heavenly Ancestors. The True Dragon Ruins are like rootless duckweed, it actually crumbles all the time, but it's so slow that we don't notice it. For a long time, the True Dragon Realm Ruin Orders have appeared one by one, not all at once. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian completely understood.

They talked for a long time before parting.

After going back, Ye Tian practiced in retreat, but it was difficult for him to improve his strength, so he could only figure out how to integrate the immeasurable magic technique into his whole body.

And this step is difficult, even he has to do it slowly, and it is normal for a long time without a little progress.

Time flies, and long years pass.

this day.

Ye Tian got a message.

"The True Dragon Realm Ruins shook violently?"

After learning this information, he immediately went to the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and he found that other Heavenly Ancestors had already come here.

Whew!!

The arrival of one Heavenly Ancestor after another was simply more than the number of Wutong Heavenly Ancestors who had been hunted down and killed.

Even the Heavenly Ancestor, who Ye Tian had never seen, also appeared at this moment.

"How could so many Heavenly Ancestors come?"

He felt weird, this was not normal.

Suddenly.

He found that the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor had also arrived.

"Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, what is going on, just because the True Dragon Realm Ruins are shaking, so many Heavenly Ancestors have come?" Ye Tian asked.

"Endless Great Ancestor, I told you before that the True Dragon Realm Ruins Order is a special token that the origin of the True Dragon Realm Ruins has fallen off and turned into. Now that the True Dragon Realm Ruins are shaking, it is one of the signs that the origin has fallen off, and they are waiting for a True Dragon Realm Ruins Order to appear!" said the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor.

"True Dragon Realm Ruin Order!"

Ye Tian was a little moved, he also wanted to get a True Dragon Realm Ruin Order.

Since it was not clear when the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order would appear, these Heavenly Ancestors were all waiting here.

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor didn't stay here, after all, he already had the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order, so there was no need to fight for it.

So, he left directly.

......

After another period of time, the shock of the True Dragon Realm Ruins began to weaken, and many Heavenly Ancestors looked nervous, they knew very well that this meant that the True Dragon Realm Ruins Order was about to be born.

Abrupt.

A ball of light fell out of the ruins of the True Dragon Realm, and this light was constantly changing, and it was evolving into the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

Whew!!

One Heavenly Ancestor after another made a move, snatching this True Dragon Realm Ruin Order that was about to be formed.

And Ye Tian also rushed over for the first time, wanting to snatch this True Dragon Realm Ruin Order.

However, the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order has not yet been completely formed, and this light cluster contains special energy, which cannot be put away, and can only be held in the hand.

Therefore, even if it is caught in the hand, it is easy to be snatched away or knocked down.

Thundered!!!!

The battle began, and here it was a complete melee.

The light cluster fell on this Heavenly Ancestor for a while, and then on the hands of another Heavenly Ancestor.

Finally.

Ye Tian snatched the light group in his hands.

At this time, other Heavenly Ancestors came to attack Ye Tian.

Ye Tian didn't want to let go, so he directly cast the ten-armed golden body, and immediately performed the extreme technique.

Burst!

The Extreme Technique directly penetrated the body of a Heavenly Ancestor.

"Extreme Technique!"

The other Heavenly Ancestors were shocked.

Ye Tian actually practiced the Extreme Technique, which was something they didn't expect.

And at the moment when the other party was stunned, he rushed out of the encirclement directly.

The True Night Ancestor, who was also at the Boundary Breaking Level, tried to intercept him, but was directly slapped away by him with his ten-armed golden body.

It was very difficult for other Heavenly Ancestors to snatch this light group from Ye Tian's body, because his strength was much stronger than that of ordinary Heavenly Ancestors.

Moreover, Ye Tian even burned immeasurable blood to fight, constantly using extreme techniques, many Heavenly Ancestors were extremely afraid, so it was difficult to snatch the light group from Ye Tian's hands.

Finally.

The light cluster disappeared, and a token was born, which was the True Dragon Realm Ruins Order.

After the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order was conceived, Ye Tian directly incorporated it into the void in his body.

At this time, the other Heavenly Ancestors had no way to snatch it, unless they killed him and took out the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order from his body.

As a result, these Heavenly Ancestors stopped one after another and congratulated: "Congratulations to the Endless Great Ancestor for snatching the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order!"
